id.description: Unique identifier for the knowledge document

source_uri.description: URI or path to the source document

status.description: Current ingestion status of the document

file_name.description: Original file name of the source document

file_size.description: Size of the source file in bytes

department_id.description: Unique identifier for the department owning this document

language.description: Detected or specified language codes for the document

chunk_count.description: Number of chunks the document has been split into

embedding_model.description: Name or identifier of the embedding model used

created_at.description: Timestamp when the document was created in the system

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the document was last updated

KnowledgeDocument.description: Represents a knowledge document that has been or will be ingested into the system

tenant_id.description: Unique identifier for the tenant submitting the ingestion request

source_type.description: Type of the source document to ingest

source_uri.description: URI or path to the source document to ingest

file_name.description: Original file name of the source document

file_size.description: Size of the source file in bytes

department_id.description: Unique identifier for the department owning this document

processing_options.description: Optional processing configuration for this ingestion request

requested_by.description: Identifier of the user or system that submitted this request

IngestionRequest.description: Request to ingest a knowledge document into the system

language_detection.description: Whether to automatically detect the language of the document

chunking_strategy.description: Strategy to use for splitting the document into chunks

max_chunk_size.description: Maximum number of tokens per chunk

overlap_size.description: Number of overlapping tokens between consecutive chunks

extract_tables.description: Whether to extract tables from the document

extract_images.description: Whether to extract images from the document

extract_metadata.description: Whether to extract metadata from the document

IngestionProcessingOptions.description: Configuration options for knowledge document ingestion processing

id.description: Unique identifier for the knowledge section

content.description: Content text of the knowledge section

section_number.description: Hierarchical section number within the document

parent_section_id.description: UUID of the parent section, if this section is nested

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata associated with this section

confidence_score.description: Confidence score indicating the quality or reliability of this section

KnowledgeSection.description: A discrete section of content extracted from an ingested document

tenant_id.description: Unique identifier for the tenant performing the search

filters.description: Additional filters to narrow the search results

top_n.description: Maximum number of results to return

retrieval_strategy.description: Strategy to use for retrieving relevant knowledge sections

start.description: Start of the time range filter

end.description: End of the time range filter

time_range.description: Time range to filter search results by

relevance_threshold.description: Minimum relevance score for results to be included

include_metadata.description: Whether to include metadata in search results

SearchQuery.description: Query for searching ingested knowledge documents and sections

id.description: Unique identifier for this search result entry

document_id.description: UUID of the document this result belongs to

score.description: Overall relevance score for this search result

content.description: Relevant content text from the matched section

section_id.description: UUID of the knowledge section this result refers to

title.description: Title of the matched knowledge section

metadata.description: Metadata associated with the matched section

similarity_score.description: Similarity score indicating how closely the content matches the query

snippet.description: Short excerpt from the content highlighting the match

SearchResult.description: A single result returned from a knowledge search query

details.description: Additional error details specific to the error context

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response for Knowledge Ingestion API operations
